# Durable Agent Work Slices

ID: `domain:durable-agent-workflows`
Kind: `domain`
Profile: `public`

LLM-agent-specific work-slice contracts, approval, leases, recovery, review evidence, and outcome archive behavior that must not become a generic workflow runtime.
